test case id: tc-addtocart-001 title: user adds a product to their cart module: addtocart source pages: 1, 4 preconditions: user is logged in and there is at least one product available. test data: product name = "laptop", price = 1000.00 test steps: 1. user navigates to the product page and selects "laptop". 2. user clicks on the "add to cart" button. 3. system adds the product to the user's cart. 4. system updates the cart display to show the added product. expected result: the product "laptop" is added to the user's cart, and the cart display reflects the updated contents.
